name: Midt-Troms Golfklubb

course.viewDescription: Midt-Troms Golfklubb i Finnkroken Golfpark - 9-hulls bane med kunstgressgreener og panoramautsikt over fjell. Par 72 (18h). 2 svært forskjellige tees per hull for variert spill. Driving range, oppvarmingsgreen, practice bunker. Golf cart/køller/tralle til leie. Kafé lør-søn. VTG-kurs. Rimelige priser med familierabatt. Nær E6 i Bardu.
course.courseType_en: 9-hole parkland course with artificial grass greens
course.viewDescription_en: Midt-Troms Golf Club at Finnkroken Golf Park - a 9-hole course with artificial grass greens and panoramic mountain views. Par 72 (18 holes). Two very different tees per hole for varied play. Driving range, warm-up green, practice bunker. Buggy/club/trolley hire available. Cafe on Saturdays and Sundays. Introduction to Golf courses. Affordable prices with family discounts. Near the E6 in Bardu.

description:
Midt-Troms Golfklubb - 9-hulls parklandbane i Finnkroken Golfpark, Bardu.

Par 36 for 9 hull (par 72 spilt 2 ganger). Banelengde: 2.506m for 9 hull.

Banen har kunstgressgreener som sikrer jevn kvalitet gjennom hele sesongen. Ligger i vakre omgivelser i det arktiske landskapet.

Spill golf under midnattssolen - en unik opplevelse i Midt-Troms!

Familievennlig klubb med rimelige priser. Seniorrabatt og familiepakker tilgjengelig.

2025.greenFeePartnerNote: Medlemmer av samarbeidsklubber i Nord-Norge, studenter, COOP-medlemmer, Forsvaret
2025.greenFeeDescription:
GREENFEE 2025:

GJESTESPILLERE:
• Voksen: 9 hull 240 kr, 18 hull/dag 400 kr
• Ungdom (tom 21 år): 9 hull 150 kr, 18 hull/dag 250 kr

MEDLEMMER/SAMARBEIDSKLUBBER/STUDENTER/COOP/FORSVARET:
• Voksen: 9 hull 180 kr, 18 hull/dag 300 kr
• Ungdom/vernepliktige: 9 hull 120 kr, 18 hull/dag 200 kr

Betaling via Gimmie App, Vipps Handlekurv eller i kafé/Proshop.
2025.notes: Dagsgreenfee gir ubegrenset spill. Kafé åpen lør-søn 10:00-16:00. Camping/bobil strøm 50 kr/døgn.
2025.greenFeeDescription_en:
Green fee 2025:

VISITORS:
• Adult: 9 holes 240 NOK, 18 holes/day 400 NOK
• Youth (up to 21 years): 9 holes 150 NOK, 18 holes/day 250 NOK

MEMBERS/PARTNER CLUBS/STUDENTS/COOP/MILITARY:
• Adult: 9 holes 180 NOK, 18 holes/day 300 NOK
• Youth/military service: 9 holes 120 NOK, 18 holes/day 200 NOK

Payment via Gimmie App, Vipps or in cafe/Pro shop.
2025.notes_en: Day green fee gives unlimited play. Cafe open Sat-Sun 10:00-16:00. Camping/motorhome electric hookup 50 NOK/24 hours.

additionalFeatures.description: Banen ligger i Finnkroken Golfpark i Bardu
Spill golf under midnattssolen om sommeren
Alle greener er kunstgress for stabil kvalitet
Veien til Golf kurs tilbys i sesongen
20% rabatt for medlemmer av samarbeidende klubber

meta.scrapeNote: ULTRA-DEEP 2026 PRICING SCRAPE - ROUND 4 (2026-02-16): Successfully scraped complete 2026 pricing from https://midttromsgolf.no/next/p/35630/priser-og-apningstider and /next/p/52839/medlemsbetingelser. Found comprehensive greenfee rates (9h/18h) for guests and members, full membership structure (adult/youth/child with/without playing rights), family discount details, student rates, remote member rates, shareholder rates, and equipment rental prices. VTG course prices also documented. Pricing remains identical to 2025 rates. Arctic location with midnight sun golf, artificial grass greens, family-friendly with 60% family discount. Café open weekends 10:00-16:00.

description_en:
Midt-Troms Golf Club - a 9-hole parkland course at Finnkroken Golf Park, Bardu.

Par 36 for 9 holes (par 72 when played twice). Course length: 2,506m for 9 holes.

The course has artificial grass greens ensuring consistent quality throughout the season. Set in beautiful surroundings in the Arctic landscape.

Play golf under the midnight sun - a unique experience in central Troms!

A family-friendly club with affordable prices. Senior discounts and family packages available.
